Local RAG System for Business Documents: Plain-English Guide

A practical guide for businesses that want staff to search company documents with AI without handing sensitive files to uncontrolled public tools.

linkedin.caption:
New EB28 private AI guide: Local RAG System for Business Documents: Plain-English Guide

The useful first version is not a giant AI demo. It is a narrow document workflow with access rules, source citations, logging, and human review.

instagram.creativeBrief: Carousel: Slide 1 local RAG in plain English, Slide 2 choose one document set, Slide 3 source citations, Slide 4 access rules, Slide 5 EB28 project brief CTA.

shortFormVideo.caption: Before you connect AI to company files, choose one workflow and prove it can cite sources safely.
shortFormVideo.brief: 30-second vertical video: 0-3s hook "Do not dump company docs into random AI tools"; 3-10s show one workflow such as SOP lookup; 10-20s source citations, permissions, logs, human review; 20-30s CTA to read the EB28 Local RAG guide.
